raw_text:

repair_target=repair blind structural gate failures
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

We need to output exactly three lines: route_verdict=CONTINUE, repair_target=repair blind structural gate failures, blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Thus we output exactly:

repair_target=repair blind structural gate failures
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Make sure no trailing spaces. Provide as plain text.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=repair blind structural gate failures
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
